arts.ttl: “We Must Have More Hunger”: Conceição Reflects on Milan’s Defeat to Juventus
arts.sum: After AC Milan's 2-0 defeat to Juventus, head coach Sergio Conceição shared his candid thoughts on the team's performance during a post-match interview with DAZN. The loss, marked by second-half goals from Mbangula and Weah, left Milan in eighth place with 31 points, while Juventus surged into a Champions League spot with 37 points. The post “We Must Have More Hunger”: Conceição Reflects on Milan’s Defeat to Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Thiago Motta: “We Work Every Day for This – Mbangula Is Helping Us a Lot.”
arts.sum: Juventus secured a crucial 2-0 victory against AC Milan at the Allianz Stadium, marking a significant moment for the team and their coach, Thiago Motta. The win was highlighted by goals from Samuel Mbangula and Timothy Weah, helping Juventus reclaim momentum in their pursuit of a top-four finish in Serie A. The post Thiago Motta: “We Work Every Day for This – Mbangula Is Helping Us a Lot.” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
